note: Aave stkAAVE claimRewardsAndStake(address to, uint256 amount) — claim `amount` of accrued AAVE rewards and immediately stake them; stkAAVE shares mint to `to`. Maps to staking::Stake (amount=$args.amount = the AAVE staked, recipient=$args.to). The staked AAVE is sourced from accrued rewards, not the wallet balance — net effect is a stake into the safety module. SCOPE ORACLE: 14.7% of recent stkAAVE txs. stkAAVE-only (stkGHO has no equivalent); selector keccak-verified.
